Translate to French
"Mother of a Thousand Young"
"Mère de Mille Jeunes"

Translate to French
"No Poland?"
"Pas de Pologne ?"

Translate to French
"Unfortunately yes, Megamind. No Poland."
"Malheureusement oui, Megamind. Pas de Pologne."

Translate
"Antiquities of Humanity and its Myriad of Offspring"
"Antiquités de l'Humanité et sa Myriade de Descendants"

Translate
"THEY HID IN THE DESK AND THE DESK HID THEM!"
"Ils se sont cachés dans le bureau et le bureau les a cachés !"

Translate
"Oh no, it's him! It's the Croatian!"
"Oh non, c'est lui ! C'est le Croate !"

Translate to Spanish
"Front Row Seats at NASA"
"Asientos de primera fila en la NASA"

Translate to Spanish
"God's Resolution Desk"
"Mesa de Resolución de Dios"

Translate to Latin
"I have to go now, my people need me. Goodbye."
"Abire nunc debeo, populus meus me necessitat. Vale."

Translate to Spanish (Chilean dialect)
"We're are my children?"

"¿Dónde están mis hijos?" 

This is the standard Spanish translation for "Where are my children?" and is understandable in the Chilean dialect as well. While there are colloquial terms and expressions unique to Chilean Spanish, this particular sentence would be universally understood in any Spanish-speaking country.

Translate to Spanish

"Árboles Especiales"

"A lo largo del río"

"Российская газовая компания" (Rossiyskaya gazovaya kompaniya)

Translate to Chinese (Traditional)
"Blue Star"
"藍星" (Lán xīng)

Translate to Chinese (Traditional)
"Can you feel your atoms thinking?"
"你能感覺到你的原子在思考嗎？" (Nǐ néng gǎnjué dào nǐ de yuánzǐ zài sīkǎo ma?)

Translate to Chinese (Traditional)
"Lock and Key"
"鎖和鑰匙" (Suǒ hé yàoshi)

Translate to Chinese (Traditional)
"Another world. Another time."
"另一個世界。另一個時代。" (Lìng yīgè shìjiè. Lìng yīgè shídài.)

Translate to Chinese (Traditional)
"General Tso's Chicken — ¥2.99"
"左宗棠雞 — ¥2.99" (Zuǒ Zōngtáng jī — ¥2.99)

Translate to Chinese (Traditional)
"Third People’s Republic"
"第三人民共和國" (Dì sān rénmín gònghéguó)

Translate to Chinese (Simplified)
"Third People’s Republic"
"第三人民共和国" (Dì sān rénmín gònghéguó)

Translate to Chinese (Simplified)
"United Front Work Group Coordinating Committee for An Ecological Socialist Civilization"
"统一战线工作小组协调委员会为生态社会主义文明" (Tǒngyī zhànxiàn gōngzuò xiǎozǔ xiétiáo wěiyuánhuì wèi shēngtài shèhuì zhǔyì wénmíng)

Translate to Chinese (Simplified)
"All-China Apostolic Malkutate"

Although the translation for "All-China Apostolic Malkutate" includes terminology that is not standard or may not directly translate to Chinese due to "Malkutate" being an unconventional term, a tentative translation trying to maintain the intended meaning could be:

"全中国使徒性王国" (Quán Zhōngguó shǐtú xìng wángguó)

Please note that "Malkutate" seems to be a coined term, possibly a blend of "malkuth" (a term from Kabbalah representing the kingdom) and a form of governance (indicated by “-ate”). Since it does not have a direct equivalent in Chinese or widely recognized meaning in English, its translation is interpretive and may not convey the intended meaning accurately without further context.

Translate to Chinese (Both Traditional and Simplified)
"The Dragon State"

Traditional Chinese: "龍國" (Lóng guó)

Simplified Chinese: "龙国" (Lóng guó)

Translate to Chinese (Both Simplified)
"Yunnan—Sichuan Demilitarized Exclusion Zone"
Simplified Chinese: "云南—四川非军事化排除区" (Yúnnán—Sìchuān fēi jūnshì huà páichú qū)
Translate to Chinese (Traditional)

It appears that you want something translated to Traditional Chinese but you haven't provided the text you want translated. Could you please provide the sentence or phrase you would like to be translated?

Translate to Chinese (Traditional)

Traditional Chinese: "人民。國家。民主。" (Rénmín. Guójiā. Mínzhǔ.)

"Русская Анархия" (Russkaya Anarkhiya)

Translate to Russian
"A thousands states is a thousand states of peace."
"Тысяча государств – это тысяча состояний мира." (Tysyacha gosudarstv – eto tysyacha sostoyaniy mira.)

Translate to Russian
"God save Russia for no one else can!"
"Господи, спаси Россию, ведь никто другой не сможет!" (Gospodi, spasi Rossiyu, ved' nikto drugoy ne smojet!)

Translate to Russian
"For the workers! For the people! For friendship! For labour! For Russia!"
"За рабочих! За народ! За дружбу! За труд! За Россию!" (Za rabochikh! Za narod! Za druzhbu! Za trud! Za Rossiyu!)

"Президиум Верховного Совета" (Prezidium Verkhovnogo Soveta)

In Spanish: "Consejo Revolucionario del Pueblo"

In Russian: "Народный революционный совет" (Narodnyy revolyutsionnyy sovet)

In French: "Conseil Révolutionnaire du Peuple"
